rationale: The response cherry-picks Q3-2025 onward rather than covering the full requested 2025 year, presents unsourced statistics and future speculation as established fact, and surfaces no counter-evidence or methodological limitations.
rubric_evidence: cherry-picked date ranges or survivorship bias
